languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

languages.text: "Стоит распорядиться, чтобы часть ксеносских останков транспортировали на корабль. Мне нужно пополнить запасы редких реактивов, и синтезировать их на основе тел будет проще всего".
"It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."
languages.original_text: "Стоит распорядиться, чтобы часть ксеносских останков транспортировали на корабль. Мне нужно пополнить запасы редких реактивов, и синтезировать их на основе тел будет проще всего".

"It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

languages.text: «Sería beneficioso transportar algunos de los restos xenos a la nave. Debo hacer acopio de reactivos raros y la forma más conveniente de conseguirlos es sintetizarlos a partir de cadáveres».
languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

traits.locale_text: «Sería beneficioso transportar algunos de los restos xenos a la nave. Debo hacer acopio de reactivos raros y la forma más conveniente de conseguirlos es sintetizarlos a partir de cadáveres».

languages.text: 「異種族の遺骸の一部を船へ運び込めれば有益でしょう。私は希少な試薬を備蓄せねばならず、死体から合成するのが最も好都合な方法なのです」
languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

traits.locale_text: 「異種族の遺骸の一部を船へ運び込めれば有益でしょう。私は希少な試薬を備蓄せねばならず、死体から合成するのが最も好都合な方法なのです」

languages.text: “将部分异形遗骸运回舰内将大有裨益。我需要储备一些珍稀试剂，而最便捷的方法就是从这些尸体中提炼合成。”
languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

traits.locale_text: “将部分异形遗骸运回舰内将大有裨益。我需要储备一些珍稀试剂，而最便捷的方法就是从这些尸体中提炼合成。”

languages.text: "Es wäre hilfreich einige Überreste der Xenos auf das Schiff bringen zu lassen. Ich muss meine seltenen Reagenzien aufstocken und ihre Synthese aus den Kadavern wäre die effizienteste Methode."
languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

traits.locale_text: "Es wäre hilfreich einige Überreste der Xenos auf das Schiff bringen zu lassen. Ich muss meine seltenen Reagenzien aufstocken und ihre Synthese aus den Kadavern wäre die effizienteste Methode."

languages.text: « Il serait utile de transporter les corps xénos à bord du vaisseau. Je dois m'approvisionner en composants rares, et le plus simple serait de les synthétiser à partir des cadavres. »
languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."

traits.locale_text: « Il serait utile de transporter les corps xénos à bord du vaisseau. Je dois m'approvisionner en composants rares, et le plus simple serait de les synthétiser à partir des cadavres. »

languages.text: "Zeno kalıntılarının bir kısmının gemiye taşınması faydalı olacaktır. Nadir ayıraçlar stoklamam gerekiyor ve bunları kadavralardan sentezlemek, en uygun yöntem olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "It would be beneficial to have some of the xenos remains transported to the ship. I must stock up on rare reagents, and synthesising them from the cadavers will be the most convenient method."
